name: playwright-aa-framework
description: Production-ready Playwright automation framework for Automation Anywhere Community Edition with complete PDF upload/download workflow

scripts.demo:smoke: cross-env DEMO_MODE=true BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 AA_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3000 AA_USERNAME=harshitha AA_PASSWORD=harshitha21 AA_API_USERNAME=harshitha AA_API_PASSWORD=harshitha21 AA_LOGIN_PATH=/v2/authentication AA_LI_PATH=/iqbot/api/v2/learning-instances npx playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.demo:test:ui: cross-env DEMO_MODE=true BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 AA_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3000 AA_USERNAME=harshitha AA_PASSWORD=harshitha21 AA_API_USERNAME=harshitha AA_API_PASSWORD=harshitha21 AA_LOGIN_PATH=/v2/authentication AA_LI_PATH=/iqbot/api/v2/learning-instances npx playwright test --project=chromium-ui
scripts.demo:test:api: cross-env DEMO_MODE=true BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 AA_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3000 AA_USERNAME=harshitha AA_PASSWORD=harshitha21 AA_API_USERNAME=harshitha AA_API_PASSWORD=harshitha21 AA_LOGIN_PATH=/v2/authentication AA_LI_PATH=/iqbot/api/v2/learning-instances npx playwright test --project=api
